skills.name: API Design
skills.description: Design a complete REST or GraphQL API from requirements. Outputs endpoints, request/response schemas, error handling, authentication, and versioning strategy.
skills.promptPreview: Design a production-ready API specification from requirements. Every endpoint, field, and error code defined with enough detail for engineers to implement.

skills.name: Async Patterns
skills.description: Design asynchronous processing patterns for background jobs, event-driven systems, and non-blocking I/O. Outputs queues, workers, retry logic, and monitoring.
skills.promptPreview: Design asynchronous processing patterns for background jobs, event-driven systems, and non-blocking I/O with retry logic and monitoring.

skills.name: Caching Strategy
skills.description: Design a multi-layer caching strategy for performance optimization. Outputs cache types, TTLs, invalidation, and cache-aside patterns.
skills.promptPreview: Design a multi-layer caching strategy with cache types, TTLs, invalidation policies, and cache-aside patterns for performance optimization.

skills.name: Circuit Breaker
skills.description: Circuit breaker pattern for handling service failures gracefully. Outputs states (closed/open/half-open), thresholds, fallback strategies, and monitoring.
skills.promptPreview: Design circuit breakers with state management, failure thresholds, half-open testing, fallback responses, and monitoring dashboards.

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Generate a focused code review checklist based on language, framework, and change type. Outputs specific items to check, not generic advice.
skills.promptPreview: Generate a focused code review checklist based on language, framework, and change type with specific items to check.

skills.name: Database Schema
skills.description: Design a normalized database schema with tables, relationships, indexes, and constraints. Outputs SQL DDL and ER diagram description.
skills.promptPreview: Design a normalized database schema with tables, relationships, indexes, constraints, and migration scripts.

skills.name: Error Handling
skills.description: Design a comprehensive error handling strategy for an application. Outputs error types, response formats, logging patterns, and user-facing messages.
skills.promptPreview: Design a comprehensive error handling strategy with error types, response formats, logging patterns, and user-facing messages.

skills.name: Feature Flags
skills.description: Feature flag system for gradual rollouts, A/B testing, and kill switches. Outputs flag types, targeting, evaluation, and lifecycle management.
skills.promptPreview: Design a feature flag system with flag types, targeting rules, evaluation logic, and lifecycle management for gradual rollouts.

skills.name: Git Workflow
skills.description: Design a Git branching strategy and workflow for a team. Outputs branch naming, merge strategy, CI/CD integration, and release process.
skills.promptPreview: Design a Git branching strategy with branch naming, merge strategy, CI/CD integration, and release process for a development team.

skills.name: Idempotency Design
skills.description: Design idempotent APIs and operations. Outputs idempotency keys, deduplication strategies, and retry-safe implementations.
skills.promptPreview: Design idempotent APIs with idempotency keys, deduplication strategies, and retry-safe implementations for reliable operations.

skills.name: Logging Strategy
skills.description: Design a comprehensive logging strategy for production systems. Outputs log structure, levels, retention, aggregation, and query patterns.
skills.promptPreview: Design a comprehensive logging strategy with log structure, levels, retention policies, aggregation, and query patterns.

skills.name: Microservices Design
skills.description: Design a microservices architecture from a monolith or new requirements. Outputs service boundaries, communication patterns, data ownership, and deployment strategy.
skills.promptPreview: Design a microservices architecture with service boundaries, communication patterns, data ownership, and deployment strategy.

skills.name: Pagination Design
skills.description: Design pagination for large datasets with cursor-based, offset-based, and keyset strategies. Outputs performance trade-offs and implementation patterns.
skills.promptPreview: Design pagination with cursor-based, offset-based, and keyset strategies including performance trade-offs and implementation patterns.

skills.name: Rate Limiting
skills.description: Design rate limiting to prevent abuse and ensure fair usage. Outputs algorithms (token bucket, sliding window), storage strategies, and bypass rules.
skills.promptPreview: Design rate limiting with token bucket, sliding window algorithms, storage strategies, and bypass rules for fair API usage.

skills.name: Tech Debt Audit
skills.description: Analyze a codebase or component to identify technical debt, assess impact, and prioritize remediation. Outputs categorized debt items with ROI estimates.
skills.promptPreview: Analyze a codebase to identify technical debt, assess impact, and prioritize remediation with categorized debt items and ROI estimates.
